name: artifact-plugin
description: Core artifact primitive for the cjhowe-us/artifact-plugin ecosystem. Three scheme kinds (vertex, edge, metadata), Pydantic-defined schemes, generic storages (file, user-config, session-memory, os-notifications), jinja2 templating via .jinja.<ext>, graph-as-artifacts. Python 3.11+; depends on nothing. Every other plugin in the ecosystem depends on this.
